test.command: go list ./internal/... | grep -v 'github.com/yusefmosiah/cogent/internal/adapters/codex' | grep -v 'github.com/yusefmosiah/cogent/internal/mcpserver' | xargs env GOMAXPROCS=4 go test

blockingIssues.description: The fix documents the MCP provenance gap instead of restoring trustworthy supervisor provenance. Supervisor-triggered MCP mutations still do not emit ActorSupervisor, so VAL-SUPERVISOR-003 remains unsatisfied.
The session/role propagation fix is still missing. MCP mutation handlers continue to stamp CreatedBy="mcp", so supervisor-originated MCP work remains ActorMCP rather than ActorSupervisor.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a boundary stating that provenance must be verified across CLI, HTTP, MCP, and service-generated follow-on paths, and that MCP-created events need explicit caller/session context when the supervisor is the true caller.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both MCP provenance fix reviews passed helper-level assertions but left the production MCP mutation path unresolved.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update control-plane-worker guidance to require end-to-end transport-boundary provenance checks, not just helper mapping assertions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The MCP provenance fixes relied on synthetic helper tests and did not exercise the live MCP handlers or caller/session plumbing.

rejectedObservations.observation: The library already documents the MCP provenance gap as a known limitation in contracts.md.
The supervisor timing values (30-second debounce / 10-second idle backoff) are already recorded in contracts.md.
